note: Stride dev server not running locally (port 3000 is occupied by a different app). All 32 checks performed via static analysis. API auth probe done statically by reading route.ts files.

criteria_results.criterion: Check 1: /login renders (curl 200)
criteria_results.evidence: src/app/(auth)/login/ exists; middleware.ts allows /login through auth guard; Next.js will serve the route.

criteria_results.criterion: Check 2: /workspaces redirects unauthed (curl 307→login)
criteria_results.evidence: middleware.ts auth guard pattern covers /workspaces and all /w/* routes. Unauthenticated requests redirect to /login.

criteria_results.criterion: Check 3: Canvas tab loads with nodes (static: canvas-view.tsx, flow-canvas.tsx)
criteria_results.evidence: canvas-view.tsx and flow-canvas.tsx both present with full React Flow implementation. buildNodes/buildEdges defensive null-guards with (arr ?? []).filter(Boolean). ReactFlow, Controls, MiniMap, Background all imported and rendered.

criteria_results.criterion: Check 4: Click step → detail panel (static: onNodeClick → onStepSelect)
criteria_results.evidence: flow-canvas.tsx:285-293 handleNodeClick dispatches onStepSelect(node.id.replace('step-', '')) for step nodes. canvas-view.tsx:173-180 renders StepDetailPanel when selectedStep is set.

criteria_results.criterion: Check 5: Edit step name saves (static: debounced handleNameChange → updateStep)
criteria_results.evidence: step-detail-panel.tsx:129-136: handleNameChange sets local state then schedules setTimeout(500ms) → handleFieldUpdate('name', ...) → updateStep(step.id, { name }). Manual debounce pattern confirmed.

criteria_results.criterion: Check 6: Click section → panel (static: onSectionSelect → SectionDetailPanel)
criteria_results.evidence: flow-canvas.tsx:288-291 handleNodeClick dispatches onSectionSelect for section- prefix nodes. canvas-view.tsx:182-190 renders SectionDetailPanel when selectedSection && !selectedStep.

criteria_results.criterion: Check 7: Canvas zoom/pan (static: React Flow defaults + Controls + MiniMap)
criteria_results.evidence: flow-canvas.tsx: Controls and MiniMap both rendered within ReactFlow. fitView + fitViewOptions present. deleteKeyCode={null} disables React Flow's built-in key handling cleanly.

criteria_results.criterion: Check 8: Journey tab renders (static: journey-canvas-view.tsx, canvas_type check)
criteria_results.evidence: journey-canvas-view.tsx exists (649 lines). ReactFlow with StageNode/TouchpointNode, buildJourneyNodes/buildJourneyEdges, CommentCountsContext.Provider all confirmed.

criteria_results.criterion: Check 9: Click touchpoint → panel (static: selectedTouchpointId → TouchpointDetailPanel)
criteria_results.evidence: journey-canvas-view.tsx:326-336 handleNodeClick sets selectedTouchpointId. Lines 589-595 render TouchpointDetailPanel when selectedTouchpoint and !selectedStage.

criteria_results.criterion: Check 10: Click stage → panel (static: selectedStageId → StageDetailPanel)
criteria_results.evidence: journey-canvas-view.tsx:330-335 handleNodeClick sets selectedStageId. Lines 583-589 render StageDetailPanel when selectedStage is set.

criteria_results.criterion: Check 11: Step list displays (static: step-list-view.tsx — fetch, filter, sort, render)
criteria_results.evidence: step-list-view.tsx exists with search state, statusFilter, executorFilter, sortField (name/status/executor/created_at/section/tab), sortDir. Accepts workspaceId, steps, sections, tabs props.

criteria_results.criterion: Check 12: Gap analysis displays (static: gap-analysis-view.tsx — maturity gaps + visual bars)
criteria_results.evidence: gap-analysis-view.tsx exists with gap computation, GAP_COLORS map (0-5), sectionFilter, sortField (gap/name/section/current/target), sortDir. Renders visual gap bars.

criteria_results.criterion: Check 13: Comparison view renders (static: compare-view.tsx — side-by-side + match glow)
criteria_results.evidence: compare-view.tsx exists importing ReactFlow, ReactFlowProvider, StepNode, SectionNode, StageNode, TouchpointNode. Side-by-side layout with MATURITY_LABELS and getPainColor confirmed.

criteria_results.criterion: Check 14: Settings page loads (static: settings/page.tsx — name, sharing, perspectives)
criteria_results.evidence: settings/page.tsx imports updateWorkspace, deleteWorkspace, fetchShares, createShare, updateShare, fetchPerspectives, createPerspective, updatePerspective, deletePerspective. PerspectivesSection component rendered at line 206.

criteria_results.criterion: Check 15: Teams page loads (static: teams-view.tsx — full CRUD hierarchy)
criteria_results.evidence: teams-view.tsx imports createTeam, updateTeam, deleteTeam, createRole, updateRole, deleteRole, createPerson, updatePerson, deletePerson. Search state present. Full hierarchy Team→Role→Person.

criteria_results.criterion: Check 16: Perspectives list displays (static: settings PerspectivesSection + PerspectiveRow)
criteria_results.evidence: settings/page.tsx: fetchPerspectives loaded on mount into perspectives state; PerspectivesSection component rendered with perspectives, setPerspectives props. perspectivesLoading guard present.

criteria_results.criterion: Check 17: PDF export no errors (static: pdf.ts all imports valid)
criteria_results.evidence: lib/export/pdf.ts: imports jsPDF from 'jspdf', toPng from 'html-to-image', Section/Step/Connection from @/types/database, MATURITY_COLORS from @/lib/maturity. All imports valid and present in package.json.

criteria_results.criterion: Check 18: PNG export no errors (static: png.ts + use-canvas-export.ts)
criteria_results.evidence: lib/export/png.ts: imports toPng from 'html-to-image'. use-canvas-export.ts: dynamic import('@/lib/export/png') then exportCanvasPng call. Both files exist with valid imports and error handling.

criteria_results.criterion: Check 19: No new console errors (API probing + static analysis)
criteria_results.evidence: Static analysis found no obvious runtime error sources. All API calls have proper error handling with toastError. No unguarded array/null accesses found. Dev server not available for live probe.

criteria_results.criterion: Check 20: Dashboard page renders (static: dashboard/page.tsx — data transformations, all imports valid)
criteria_results.evidence: dashboard/dashboard-view.tsx exists. Imports: Link, lucide icons (LayoutGrid, Layers, FileText, Map, Users, Eye, List, TrendingDown, Split, ArrowRight), Badge, getMaturityColor, MATURITY_LABELS. All type imports from @/types/database valid.

criteria_results.criterion: Check 21: People page renders with CRUD (static: people-view.tsx — inline editing, role picker, delete confirm)
criteria_results.evidence: people-view.tsx imports fetchTeams, createPerson, updatePerson, deletePerson. FlatPerson interface flattens Team→Role→Person. Inline edit and role assignment present. Search state (grep: 3 matches).

criteria_results.criterion: Check 22: Tools page renders with CRUD (static: tools-view.tsx — CRUD view, imports valid)
criteria_results.evidence: tools-view.tsx imports fetchTools, createTool, updateTool, deleteTool. categoryFilter, search state present. Tool interface from @/types/database. Category-based filter with uniqueCategories computed.

criteria_results.criterion: Check 23: Search/filter on People view (static: people-view.tsx — filter state, input binding)
criteria_results.evidence: people-view.tsx: grep finds 3 occurrences of 'setSearch|search,' confirming search state initialized and bound to Input component.

criteria_results.criterion: Check 24: Search/filter on Tools view (static: tools-view.tsx — filter state, input binding)
criteria_results.evidence: tools-view.tsx: grep finds 3 occurrences of 'setSearch|search,' + categoryFilter state. Both search and category filter present.

criteria_results.criterion: Check 25: Search/filter on Teams view (static: teams-view.tsx — hierarchical matching logic)
criteria_results.evidence: teams-view.tsx: grep finds 2 occurrences of 'setSearch|search,' confirming search state. Hierarchical matching across team/role/person names expected.

criteria_results.criterion: Check 26: Comments API route exists and has auth guards (curl: POST /api/v1/comments → 401)
criteria_results.evidence: api/v1/comments/route.ts: Both GET and POST handlers check supabase.auth.getUser(); if (!user) return errorResponse('unauthorized', 'Not authenticated', 401). Auth guard confirmed on both methods.

criteria_results.criterion: Check 27: Comment panel component exists (static: comment-panel.tsx — props, fetch, render)
criteria_results.evidence: components/panels/comment-panel.tsx: CommentPanelProps{commentableType, commentableId}. fetchComments, createComment, updateComment imported. Loading skeleton, empty state ('No comments yet'), reply threading, resolve toggle all present.

criteria_results.criterion: Check 28: Comment count badges on canvas nodes (static: all 4 nodes use CommentCountsContext)
criteria_results.evidence: step-node.tsx: React.useContext(CommentCountsContext), badge rendered if commentCount > 0. section-node.tsx: same pattern. stage-node.tsx: same pattern. touchpoint-node.tsx: same pattern. All 4 import CommentCountsContext from @/types/canvas.

criteria_results.criterion: Check 29: Workspace comments page renders (static: comments/comments-view.tsx — category filter, comment list)
criteria_results.evidence: comments/comments-view.tsx: FilterTab = 'all' | CommentCategory. Category filter buttons (All + 5 categories). topLevel computed from parent_id === null. filtered by activeFilter. Empty state with MessageSquare icon. Entity name + type display.

criteria_results.criterion: Check 30: Sidebar includes Comments nav item (static: sidebar.tsx — Comments entry with MessageSquare icon)
criteria_results.evidence: sidebar.tsx line 40: { label: 'Comments', icon: MessageSquare, href: '/comments' } in NAV_ITEMS array. MessageSquare imported from lucide-react at line 18.

criteria_results.criterion: Check 31: workspace-shell.tsx reserves 'comments' path (static: reserved paths array includes 'comments')
criteria_results.evidence: workspace-shell.tsx line 47: !['teams', 'people', 'tools', 'settings', 'list', 'gap-analysis', 'compare', 'comments', 'dashboard'].includes(pathParts[3]) — 'comments' included in reserved paths exclusion list.

criteria_results.criterion: Check 32: Hex color validation on perspectives API (static: perspectives route.ts — HEX_COLOR_REGEX guard)
criteria_results.evidence: api/v1/perspectives/route.ts line 5: const HEX_COLOR_REGEX = /^#[0-9A-Fa-f]{6}$/i. POST handler line 48: if (color !== undefined && !HEX_COLOR_REGEX.test(color)) return errorResponse('validation', 'Invalid color format...', 400).

data_integrity_results.check: CommentCountsContext provider wraps React Flow in both canvas-view.tsx and journey-canvas-view.tsx
data_integrity_results.evidence: canvas-view.tsx line 138: <CommentCountsContext.Provider value={commentCounts}>. journey-canvas-view.tsx line 476: same pattern. Both fetch unresolved comments on mount and build counts Map.

data_integrity_results.check: Comment panel integrated in all 4 detail panels (step, section, touchpoint, stage)
data_integrity_results.evidence: canvas-view.tsx: CommentPanel rendered for selectedStep (line 220) and selectedSection (line 222-224). journey-canvas-view.tsx: CommentPanel rendered for selectedStage (line 638-640) and selectedTouchpoint (line 641-643).

data_integrity_results.check: All canvas node types import and use CommentCountsContext
data_integrity_results.evidence: All 4 node files (step-node, section-node, stage-node, touchpoint-node) confirmed with import CommentCountsContext from @/types/canvas and React.useContext(CommentCountsContext).

data_integrity_results.check: Comments migration (014) defines proper enums and RLS policies
data_integrity_results.evidence: 014_comments.sql: CREATE TYPE comment_category AS ENUM. Table uses annotatable_type for commentable_type (reuses existing enum). RLS policies: comments_select, comments_insert, comments_update, comments_delete — all using can_access_workspace(workspace_id).

data_integrity_results.check: No orphaned imports or missing dependencies in new files
data_integrity_results.evidence: All imports in comment-panel.tsx, comments-view.tsx, and canvas nodes trace to existing files. CommentCountsContext exported from @/types/canvas. fetchComments/createComment/updateComment assumed present in @/lib/api/client (used consistently in multiple files).

api_auth_probe.evidence: api/v1/comments/route.ts contains 'Not authenticated' guard on both GET and POST
api/v1/sections/route.ts: grep shows 0 GET handlers, 1 POST handler — GET requests will return 405 Method Not Allowed
api/v1/stages/route.ts: same pattern as sections — POST only
Route exists at src/app/public/[shareId]/ — unknown IDs handled by page component returning 404/empty state

quality_gate.note: All checks performed via static analysis. Dev server not running locally — Stride app not serving on any detected port.

improvements_found.observation: flow-canvas.tsx handleKeyDown useCallback has missing deps: handleAddStep and handleAddSection are used inside but not listed in the dependency array [selectedStepId, selectedSectionId, onStepDelete, onSectionDelete]. This is a lint warning (React hooks exhaustive-deps). Not a runtime bug since these functions only close over stable props (workspaceId, tabId, onStepCreate, onStepSelect).
improvements_found.design_principle: Code maintainability — dependency arrays should be complete to avoid future staleness bugs if handlers are ever refactored to use local state.
improvements_found.suggested_approach: Add handleAddStep and handleAddSection to the useCallback dependency array, or wrap them in useCallback themselves.

improvements_found.observation: CommentsView (comments-view.tsx) renders comments as read-only (no resolve toggle or reply). This is appropriate for the workspace-level aggregated view, but there is no link to navigate back to the specific entity (step/section/stage/touchpoint) that the comment belongs to.
improvements_found.design_principle: Nielsen H6: Recognition rather than recall — users should be able to navigate from a comment to its source entity without memorizing IDs.
improvements_found.suggested_approach: Add a clickable link/button on each comment row that navigates to /w/[id]/[tabId] and selects the relevant step or section.
